name: American Debt Pros, LLC
description_short: American Debt Pros, LLC is a credit repair provider based in Indianapolis, Indiana. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
American Debt Pros, LLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in Indianapolis, Indiana. The company serves consumers in the Indianapolis area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a credit counseling service, American Debt Pros, LLC provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions.

When evaluating credit repair services in Indianapolis, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. American Debt Pros, LLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Indianapolis, Indiana area who are considering American Debt Pros, LLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
